title: Compatible Ore Borders
description: Ore Borders in Minecraft, with compatibility for every mod and resource pack.
body:
![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/ktjItZvU?label=Downloads)\
Compatible Ore Borders is a pack that makes it easier to see in caves, whilst maintaining good performance and compatibility with other mods and resource packs! This pack uses json models to apply the border texture to the block, instead of changing the texture of the ores, no matter the pack your using, and both the ore and the border texture change to fit with the pack!\
Each border has the main colour of the ore around it, like blueish for diamond.
This is for people who want to use ore borders, but really like to use a certain pack that they can't play without.\
Visit [here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/bedrock-ore-borders/) for bedrock ore borders.\
I hope you enjoy!

Changed ores (includes deepslate variants):\
Diamond ore\
Redstone ore\
Coal ore\
Copper ore\
Iron ore\
Emerald ore\
Gilded blackstone\
Ancient debris\
Nether quartz ore\
Nether gold ore\
Lapis Lazuli ore\
Gold ore\
Copper ore

Compatible with 1.18+!
